venture.title: Venture
venture.subtitle: Track private venture investments — SPVs, syndicates, fund deals.

platforms.title: Venture platforms
platforms.subtitle: Syndicates, fund managers, and GPs you invest through. Defaults here pre-fill new deals.
platforms.emptyDescription: Add the syndicates or GPs you invest through (e.g., Acme Ventures, AngelList). Configure default fees once — applied to all deals on that platform.
platforms.createDialogDescription: A venture platform represents a syndicate or fund manager. Default fees pre-fill deals created on this platform.
platforms.editDialogDescription: Updates apply to future deals. Existing deals keep their original fee snapshots.
platforms.deleteDescription: {name} will be removed. Deals on this platform stay but lose their platform link. This can be undone via the trash.

events.emptyTimeline: No events yet. Add an event to start tracking distributions, NAV updates, or exits.
events.createDialogDescription: Record a distribution, NAV update, exit, or other event. Carry is auto-computed for distribution/exit events.
events.deleteDescription: This event will be permanently removed. Linked transactions stay in your records by default.

deals.emptyDescription: Create your first deal to start tracking a venture investment — SPV, syndicate, or fund participation.
deals.emptyNoPlatformHint: You can create deals without a platform, but linking one to a syndicate/GP lets defaults flow through. Start by adding a platform.
deals.createDialogDescription: Represents a single SPV or fund investment. Fees pre-fill from the selected platform; you can override per deal.
deals.editDialogDescription: Updates apply going forward; historical event values are not retroactively recalculated.
deals.deleteDescription: {name} will be removed along with all its events. This can be undone via the trash.

form.principalHint: The cash amount you commit to the deal, excluding any platform fees. For SPV syndicates this is typically your subscription amount before the entry fee.
form.entryFeeHint: One-time fee paid to the syndicate lead or platform. Auto-calculated as principal × entry-fee %; you can override with a custom value.
form.entryFeePctHint: Percentage of principal taken as the upfront entry fee (typical: 0–10% for AngelList syndicates).
form.mgmtFeePctHint: Annual management fee charged by the syndicate or fund (typical: 0–2%). Stored for the record; not auto-applied to events in v1.
form.carryPctHint: The GP's share of profits above the hurdle (typical: 20%). Applied automatically to distribution and exit events; you can override per event.
form.hurdlePctHint: Minimum simple-interest return LPs must earn before the GP starts taking carry. 0% means the GP earns carry on every dollar of profit. v1 uses a simple-hurdle approximation; full IRR-based waterfalls land in v2.
form.targetCompanyHint: Free-text label for the underlying company or thesis (e.g. "OpenAI Series E" or "YC W26 batch"). Used for display only; no validation.
form.subtypeHint: Single-company: SPV invests in one startup. Multi-company: SPV holds positions in several startups (e.g. an AngelList syndicate of a whole YC batch).
form.expectedExitDateHint: Estimated date when the SPV is expected to return capital. Stored for time-to-exit metrics and v2 reminders; does not affect carry math.
